nasb.text: Then the prophet Jeremiah spoke to the prophet Hananiah in the presence of the priests and in the presence of all the people who were standing in the house of the Lord,

esv.text: Then the prophet Jeremiah spoke to Hananiah the prophet in the presence of the priests and all the people who were standing in the house of the Lord,

cnv.text: 耶利米先知當著祭司和站在耶和華殿裡的眾民面前，對哈拿尼雅先知說：

ccb.text: 耶利米先知当着站在耶和华殿里的祭司和民众的面对哈拿尼雅先知说：
